content.query:
/*============================================================
  Ensure schema exists
============================================================*/
IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.schemas
    WHERE name = 'config'
)
BEGIN
    EXEC ('CREATE SCHEMA config');
END;
GO

/*============================================================
  Recreate table
============================================================*/
IF OBJECT_ID('config.IngestionConfig', 'U') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    DROP TABLE config.IngestionConfig;
END;
GO

/*============================================================
  Create table
============================================================*/
CREATE TABLE config.IngestionConfig
(
    ConfigId         INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
    ProjectName      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    LoadOrder        INT NOT NULL,
    LoadType         VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,   -- FULL / INCREMENTAL

    IsActive         BIT NOT NULL
        CONSTRAINT DF_IngestionConfig_IsActive DEFAULT (1),

    SourceContainer  VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    SourceDirectory  VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
    FileName         VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,

    TargetSchema     VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    TargetTable      VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,

    SilverProcName   VARCHAR(256) NULL,
    EnableSilver     BIT NOT NULL
        CONSTRAINT DF_IngestionConfig_EnableSilver DEFAULT (1)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

/*============================================================
  Load config rows
============================================================*/
TRUNCATE TABLE config.IngestionConfig;
GO

INSERT INTO config.IngestionConfig
(
    ProjectName,
    LoadOrder,
    LoadType,
    IsActive,
    SourceContainer,
    SourceDirectory,
    FileName,
    TargetSchema,
    TargetTable,
    SilverProcName,
    EnableSilver
)
SELECT 'demo',      1, 'FULL',        1, 'test',     'source', 'customers.csv', 'bronze', 'customers', 'silver.sp_load_customers',      1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'demo',      2, 'FULL',        1, 'test',     'source', 'products.csv',  'bronze', 'products',  'silver.sp_load_products',       1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'demo',      3, 'FULL',        1, 'test',     'source', 'orders.csv',    'bronze', 'orders',    'silver.sp_load_orders',         1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'waittime',  1, 'FULL',        1, 'waittime', 'source', 'patients.csv',  'bronze', 'patients',  'silver.sp_load_patients',       1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'waittime',  2, 'FULL',        1, 'waittime', 'source', 'visits.csv',    'bronze', 'visits',    'silver.sp_load_visits',         1

UNION ALL
SELECT 'demo',      1, 'INCREMENTAL', 1, 'test',     'source', 'customers.csv', 'bronze', 'customers', 'silver.sp_load_customers_inc',  1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'demo',      2, 'INCREMENTAL', 1, 'test',     'source', 'products.csv',  'bronze', 'products',  'silver.sp_load_products_inc',   1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'demo',      3, 'INCREMENTAL', 1, 'test',     'source', 'orders.csv',    'bronze', 'orders',    'silver.sp_load_orders_inc',     1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'waittime',  1, 'INCREMENTAL', 1, 'waittime', 'source', 'patients.csv',  'bronze', 'patients',  'silver.sp_load_patients_inc',   1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'waittime',  2, 'INCREMENTAL', 1, 'waittime', 'source', 'visits.csv',    'bronze', 'visits',    'silver.sp_load_visits_inc',     1;
GO

/*============================================================
  Check config
============================================================*/
SELECT *
FROM config.IngestionConfig
ORDER BY ProjectName, LoadType, LoadOrder;
GO

/*============================================================
  Watermark column
============================================================*/
ALTER TABLE config.IngestionConfig
ADD WatermarkColumn VARCHAR(128) NULL;
GO

UPDATE config.IngestionConfig
SET WatermarkColumn = 'visit_date'
WHERE ProjectName = 'waittime'
  AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
  AND TargetTable = 'visits';

UPDATE config.IngestionConfig
SET WatermarkColumn = 'order_date'
WHERE ProjectName = 'demo'
  AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
  AND TargetTable = 'orders';
GO

/*============================================================
DeltaProcName
============================================================*/


ALTER TABLE config.IngestionConfig
ADD DeltaProcName VARCHAR(256) NULL;
GO

UPDATE config.IngestionConfig
SET DeltaProcName = 'staging.sp_load_orders_delta'
WHERE ProjectName = 'demo'
  AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
  AND TargetTable = 'orders';

UPDATE config.IngestionConfig
SET DeltaProcName = 'staging.sp_load_visits_delta'
WHERE ProjectName = 'waittime'
  AND LoadType = 'INCREMENTAL'
  AND TargetTable = 'visits';
GO

UPDATE config.IngestionConfig
SET DeltaProcName = NULL
WHERE LoadType = 'FULL';
GO
